about.title_post: Twelve years making protection operational, measurable and human.
about.lede: ASHA Solution integrates Cyber Intelligence, Cybersecurity, Information Security and Cyberfraud prevention to stop high-complexity attacks that bypass conventional tooling — with an in-house team, validated frameworks and 24/7 operations between Mexico City and Tenerife.
about.who_title: We are not another cybersecurity vendor.
about.who_p1: At ASHA Solution we are not another vendor of off-the-shelf products or services. Our approach centers on integrating leading-brand solutions and adapting them to each client's specific context — banking, insurance, retail, telco and critical operations across LATAM.
about.who_p2: Our commitment is to deliver innovative Information Security practices with continuous improvement that exceed our clients' expectations — guaranteeing high-impact results and an exceptional experience at every interaction.
about.essence_title: Aša — the organizing principle of the universe.
about.essence_p1: ASHA comes from the Old Persian "aša" and Middle Persian "ard." It can be translated as "the organizing principle of the universe" — which for us became the motto:
about.essence_p2: This ideology defines us as a company. We make sure our services are grounded in the best practices, standards and frameworks — delivered with agile methodologies and simple, innovative service models. Our highly qualified professionals carry agnostic knowledge that understands not only the technologies in use, but the environment around them.
about.track_lede: A decade protecting critical LATAM organizations — validated by the vendors under MSSP contracts.
about.metric_years_caption: Without missing a single day of preparation — continuous specialization to deliver excellence in service.
about.metric_clients_caption: Leaders in Banking, Insurance, Retail, Telco and Real Estate trust us.
about.metric_projects_caption: Deep experience in threat hunting, fraud detection and information protection.
about.why_title: Six reasons to work with ASHA.
about.why_1_d: Highly customized solutions for each client's needs and context — not canned products.
about.why_2_d: Aligned to NIST 2.0, MITRE ATT&CK, ISO 27001:2022 and the reference frameworks that optimize operations.
about.why_3_d: Focus on banking, finance, insurance and retail — sectors where incident cost is measured in hours and money.
about.why_4_d: Our own MISP platform for threat monitoring and incident response with dedicated client telemetry.
about.why_5_d: Leaders and consultants with technical certifications from the vendors that anchor our practices.
about.why_6_d: Security Operations Center applying the CSIRT methodology and integrating services from the best vendors.
about.certs_title: The highest level of certification in Latin America.
about.alli_title: We work with the leaders of the Gartner quadrant.
about.alli_lede: A network of tier-1 vendors and partners that backs every ASHA methodology under MSSP contracts.
about.final_cta_pre: Discover how we can shield your organization against

contact.title_pre: We're here to protect your organization with
contact.lede: Complete the form and our CSIRT team will validate your request — response in under 24 hours. You can also email us directly at contacto@asha.mx.
contact.brief_title: In-house CSIRT team. Response validated by humans.
contact.brief_lede: At ASHA Solution we've developed innovative cybersecurity practices to stop high-complexity attacks. Complete the form and we'll get back to you in under 24 hours.
contact.rfc_en: View & download our RFC 2350 — English version

csirt.lede: Integral Threat Hunting approach that detects hidden and fileless attacks using advanced telemetry from network, email, Active Directory, endpoints, cloud (XDR) and dark/deep web sources — aligned to MITRE ATT&CK, NIST and MISP.
csirt.brief_title: 71% of new attacks are hidden or fileless.
csirt.brief_p1: Threat Hunting is "a proactive approach to cybersecurity that identifies and mitigates digital threats before they cause damage." That makes it essential to hunt threats modeled across network, email, Active Directory, endpoints, cloud (XDR) and dark/deep web sources.
csirt.brief_p2: Aligned to MITRE ATT&CK and NIST, we integrate advanced techniques with MISP to optimize incident response — modeled telemetry, human validation, automation with guard-rails.
csirt.stat_label: of new attacks are hidden and/or fileless.
csirt.fn_1_d: Deep knowledge of threat actors to guide the hunt with informed hypotheses.
csirt.fn_2_d: Technology integrated across every attack vector, with contextualized data and real-time threat intel.
csirt.fn_3_d: AI-driven identification with MITRE validation; NG-SIEM storage at 80% less cost than traditional SIEM.
csirt.fn_4_d: Data correlation, attack visualization, fast searches and generative-AI assistance for deep analysis.
csirt.fn_5_d: Investigation documentation in graph format — easy to audit and easy to explain to non-technical stakeholders.
csirt.fn_6_d: Automated response coordination for endpoint and cloud workload containment — humans validate, machines execute.
csirt.final_cta_pre: Suspect an incident or want to hunt threats in your telemetry?

ctem.title_post: — assets protected with precision and speed.
ctem.lede: CTEM — Continuous Threat Exposure Management. We identify and mitigate vulnerabilities proactively, and simulate red-team attacks to harden your defensive surface. Automated patching, business-risk prioritization and executive reporting in a single practice.
ctem.brief_title: 21,000+ CVEs published every year. Which ones matter to your business?
ctem.brief_p1: The National Vulnerability Database recorded over 21,000 vulnerabilities in 2022 — and the number grows every year. Without a continuous exposure management practice, IT teams drown in the noise and attackers find the gap first.
ctem.brief_p2: ASHA tackles this challenge with an integral CTEM approach that combines exposure management, assessment, prioritization, validation and simulation. Our automated remediation solutions reduce IT operational load by more than 80%.
ctem.stat_label: less operational load on the IT team with automated patching at scale.
ctem.stat_source: Source: ASHA deployments · LATAM banking & retail
ctem.fn_1_d: Continuous identification and classification of network components — endpoints, workloads, cloud, identities.
ctem.fn_2_d: Detection of CVEs and misconfigurations with continuous scanning + contextualized threat intel.
ctem.fn_3_d: Classification by CVSS, real-world exploitability and business risk — not every CVE deserves your attention today.
ctem.fn_4_d: Automated patches and mitigations at scale with guard-rails — humans approve, machines deploy.
ctem.fn_5_d: Red-team simulations aligned to MITRE ATT&CK — they identify real vectors before the adversary does.
ctem.fn_6_d: Technical reports for IT and risk dashboards for the board — one data set, two audiences.
ctem.final_cta_pre: How many critical CVEs do you have open today?
ctem.final_cta_accent: Let's start by measuring your exposure

grc.ticker_br: ISO 27001 · NIST CSF · GDPR · LGPD · COBIT
grc.title_post: — confidentiality, integrity and availability at every layer.
grc.lede: Holistic approach combining Shadow IT, AI for discovery, classification with over 60% precision from day one, encryption, technology-agnostic DLP and governance aligned to ISO 27001, NIST CSF, GDPR and LGPD.
grc.brief_title: Data protected at every layer — from discovery to compliance.
grc.brief_p1: We use a holistic approach that begins with Shadow IT implementation to ensure data lives in organization-approved applications. We leverage AI and machine learning to discover data across the entire organization with full inventory visibility.
grc.brief_p2: Our core strategies include: identifying duplicate information with secure removal, encrypting sensitive data, protecting databases, and governance with risk assessments for precise classification — aligned to the leading LATAM and global regulatory frameworks.
grc.stat_label: data classification precision from initial discovery — millions of documents processed in under 30 days.
grc.comp_title: The full governance, risk and compliance cycle.
grc.fn_1_d: Alignment with LATAM and global regulatory frameworks — ISO 27001, NIST CSF 2.0, GDPR, LGPD, local laws by country.
grc.fn_2_d: Strengthening security posture with agnostic DLP, encryption and continuous access controls.
grc.fn_3_d: Risk mitigation via validated, effective controls — from strategic analysis to measurable operations.
grc.fn_4_d: Operational efficiency based on classified data — less noise, faster decisions, predictable costs.
grc.fn_5_d: Training programs for staff + simulations ready to activate when the real incident arrives.
grc.fn_6_d: Roadmap and consulting tailored to the client's context — board-level reporting and a multi-year investment plan.
grc.frw_title: We meet the standards your industry demands.
grc.final_cta_pre: Is your organization ready for a regulatory audit tomorrow?
grc.final_cta_post: — you'll know where you stand and what's missing.

intel.title_post: — we anticipate the attack before it happens.
intel.lede: Integrates threat-management frameworks, OSINT and advanced tooling to protect email domains, prevent brand abuse and leverage AI-driven intelligence — feeding the NGSOC and CSIRT in real time.
intel.brief_title: Threat Intelligence + Brand Protection + Email Spoofing — in a single practice.
intel.brief_p1: Our practice integrates threat-management frameworks and advanced tools to protect email domains, prevent brand abuse and leverage AI-driven intelligence to anticipate attacks.
intel.brief_p2: This practice's output feeds the NGSOC with contextualized external telemetry and the CSIRT with investigable cases — closing the loop between the emerging threat and the defensive response.
intel.stat_label: continuous monitoring of dark web, marketplaces and social media — the threat actors don't rest, neither do we.
intel.fn_1_d: Monitoring of impersonated domains, takedown of fraudulent sites, and surveillance of unauthorized mobile apps.
intel.fn_2_d: Detection of compromised accounts, credentials and client data for sale on illicit markets.
intel.fn_3_d: Continuous surveillance of forums, Telegram channels, leak sites and the deep web for emerging organizational threats.
intel.fn_4_d: Active-malware telemetry, IoCs ingested into the SIEM, and signatures distributed via MISP to client controls.
intel.fn_5_d: Detection of fake accounts, disinformation campaigns and fraudulent activity on social media affecting the brand.
intel.fn_6_d: Securing the critical corporate communication vector — SPF, DKIM, DMARC enforcement and reporting.
intel.final_cta_pre: Do you know what's happening with your brand on the deep web right now?

fraud.ticker_br: KYC · AML · FATF · MITRE · BEHAVIORAL AI
fraud.lede: Cyber Fraud Fusion: a framework that integrates AI, machine learning, behavioral biometrics and transaction monitoring with alliances with the leading global security agencies — KYC/AML aligned to FATF, MITRE ATT&CK and LATAM regulators.
fraud.brief_title: Cybersecurity + Cyber Intelligence + Fraud Prevention — a single framework.
fraud.brief_p1: Our Cyber Fraud Fusion practice integrates cutting-edge technology with artificial intelligence, machine learning and advanced behavioral-detection systems — because modern fraud isn't beaten with static rules.
fraud.brief_p2: We have expert fraud analysts and alliances with the leading global security agencies — access to global databases of suspects and cybercriminals. We guarantee "to detect and prevent fraud and money laundering with precision and effectiveness, ensuring security and regulatory compliance."
fraud.stat_label: disciplines fused into a single practice: cyber, intelligence, antifraud — plus alliances with global agencies.
fraud.fn_1_d: Brand protection against malicious activity and impersonation — direct feed from Threat Intel.
fraud.fn_2_d: Verification on income platforms for KYC/AML compliance, aligned to FATF and local regulators.
fraud.fn_3_d: AI-driven fraud detection based on behavioral biometric patterns — keystroke, mouse, device, session.
fraud.fn_4_d: Anti-money-laundering monitoring aligned to a MITRE ATT&CK framework adapted to financial services — alerts prioritized by risk.
fraud.fn_5_d: Operational layer that unifies cyber, intel and antifraud teams — single case management, measurable SLA.
fraud.fn_6_d: Alliances with international agencies and suspect databases — the cybercriminal rarely acts alone.
fraud.frw_title: We meet global and local standards.
fraud.final_cta_pre: Modern fraud doesn't wait. Does your organization?

careers.title_pre: Guarantee continuous protection for your company with our
careers.title_post: — designed to anticipate and contain attacks.
careers.lede: Apply to an open role at ASHA Solution. If your profile is a fit, we'll get back to you to continue the process. We operate 24/7 between CDMX and Tenerife — team distributed across five LATAM countries plus Spain.
careers.areas_lede: Four operational fronts — from the technical trenches to the back-office that sustains the 24/7 operation.
careers.area_1_d: Defense specialists: CSIRT, NGSOC, Cloud Security, threat hunting and detection engineering.
careers.area_2_d: Management and delivery of strategic projects — from kickoff to measurable handoff.
careers.area_3_d: Expert consulting and market expansion across LATAM — technical sales that don't sell vapor.
careers.area_4_d: Operational, financial and human-capital support — the foundation that makes everything else possible.
